parameters.query: INSERT INTO conversation_logs (session_id, user_message, ai_response, model_used, response_time) VALUES ('{{ $json.sessionId }}', '{{ $json.userMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.aiMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.modelUsed }}', {{ $json.responseTime }}) RETURNING id;
